test_name: October 2025 International Form B SAT Math Module 2
passage: A sum of 9,000 dollars was invested in a certificate of deposit (CD) that earns interest, and no other deposits or withdrawals were made after that. The function f(x)=9,000 $(1+0.03)^{x}$ gives the value of the CD, in dollars, x years after the investment was initially made, where $ x\le5 $. Which of the following is the best interpretation of the statement "f(2) is approximately equal to 9,474.08" in this context?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The value of the CD would be approximately 9,474.08 dollars if investedat 2% interest.

choices.label: B
choices.text: 9,474.08 days after the investment was made, the value of the CD was approximately 2 times greater than its initial value.

choices.label: C
choices.text: years after the investment was made, the value of the CD was approximately 9,474.08 dollars.

choices.label: D
choices.text: years after the investment was made, the value of the CD wasapproximately 9,474.08 dollars greater than its initial value.

passage: The table shows three values of x and their corresponding values of y. There is a quadratic relationship between x and y. An equation that represents this relationship can be written as $ y=36x^{2}-bx-120 $, where b is a constant. What is the value of b?

test_name: October 2025 International Form B SAT Math Module 2
passage: Hannah and Wyatt are saving money to purchase a car. Hannah saves $\frac{1}{5}$ of her salary each month, and Wyatt saves $\frac{2}{7}$ of his salary each month. Together, they save a total of 3,270 from their monthly salaries each month. lf h and w represent Hannah's and Wyatt's monthly salaries, in dollars, respectively, which equation shows the relationship between h and w?

test_name: October 2025 International Form B SAT Math Module 2
passage: The figure shows a rectangular pool surrounded by a concrete path that is x feet (ft) wide on all sides. The pool is 21 ft long and 11 ft wide. The area of the concrete path is 144 $ ft^{2}$, What is the value of x?

test_name: October 2025 International Form B SAT Math Module 2
passage: At a nature preserve, a wildlife biologist counted bald eagles from an observation deck at the same time each day for 21 days. The table summarizes the resulting data set, data set A. The data value 19 was recorded in error and is removed from data set A to create data set B, which consists of the remaining 20 data values. Which statement best compares the median of data set A and the median of data set B?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The median of data set B is less than the median of data set A.

choices.label: B
choices.text: The median of data set B is equal to the median of data set A.

choices.label: C
choices.text: The median of data set B is greater than the median of data set A.

choices.label: D
choices.text: There is not enough information to compare the medians of the two data sets.

(The surface area of a right circular cylinder with radius r and height h is $ 2\pi r^{2}+2\pi rh $.)

test_name: October 2025 International Form B SAT Math Module 2
passage: For a certain type of rope, the equation $ y=900ax^{2}$, where a is a constant, gives the estimated breaking strength y, in pounds, of a rope with a circumference of x inches. What is the estimated breaking strength, in pounds, of a rope of this type thathas a circumference of 3.50 inches?
